payload.description: Celebrated diverse cultural year end traditions and reflected on All Generational accomplishments in 2025
Latinos & Friends hosted Hector Garcia, LIRR Chief of Staff - President's Office, for a Cafecito Chat providing employees access to senior leadership
Second Professional Speed Networking event for ERG members and MTA employees

payload.claim_text: 2 complaints were filed citing 1 basis. The most frequently singularly-cited basis was race. There was 0 lawsuit filed.
payload.subject: BTA Employee Discrimination

payload.description: B.E.G.I.N. invited members to a networking and pre-holiday celebration at Public House and Kitchen

tool_args.label: All Generational MNR Train Module Workshop & Exhibition

payload.description: All Generational continued Train Module building workshops at MTA Headquarters (2 Broadway); MTA employees worked together to build sections of an operating model railroad. Culminated in a public exhibition at 2 Broadway.

tool_args.label: All Generational Train Module Workshop LIRR-Hillside

payload.description: All Generational continued Train Module building workshops at LIRR-Hillside working on a LIRR Dual-Mode locomotive. Concluded with an exhibition for staff and leadership.

B.E.G.I.N.'s Black History Month celebration, A Celebration of the Culture: A Century of Black History, at MTA Headquarters featuring multimedia presentations, soloist performance, and poetry readings
